verify.cmd: for f in templates/skills/*.md; do head -10 $f | grep -c '🟥🟧🟨🟩🟦🟪'; tail -5 $f | grep -cE '💎|💀|😂'; done

jq_probe_cmd: for f in templates/skills/*.md; do head -10 $f | grep -q '🟥🟧🟨🟩🟦🟪' && tail -5 $f | grep -qE '💎|💀|😂' && echo ok; done | wc -l
notes: drift fixed in 5 templates; roadmap-night already compliant. Per /stance walk-back the rainbow-banner discipline survives INFECTION-clause narrowing. Diff vs live SKILL.md will widen for 4 of 6 — reconciled by skill-sync-roadmap-auto/spec (deps not yet executed) and a follow-up sync sweep for orient/term/threads which the upstream sync nodes do not cover; nominate r2 successor: skill-sync-orient-term-threads to round-trip new banners+closers into ~/.claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md and preserve §Skill-template-must-match-live.
